description: Create a scheduled report named 'Index_Latency_Summary', an alert named 'Critical_Latency_Alert', and a dashboard named 'Data_Quality_Monitoring' to monitor ingestion latency (the difference between _indextime and _time) across all data sources. The report must aggregate latency metrics grouped by index. The alert should be configured to trigger when latency exceeds 3600 seconds. The dashboard must contain at least one visualization panel showing latency metrics by index. Log in using username 'admin' and password 'SplunkAdmin1!' at http://localhost:8000.
